title: rosa tomentosa var. dimorpha
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. dimorpha, also known as Rosa tomentosa var. dimorpha or Himalayan rose, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa var. dimorpha include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rosa tomentosa var. dimorpha is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
